title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCVIII. Natural History.
content:
The cat sat asleep by the side of the fire,
            The mistress snored loud as a pig:
        Jack took up his fiddle, by Jenny's desire,
            And struck up a bit of a jig.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCVIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
